note: Teenager week. The prompt calls for a light, optional, self-directed routine the teen owns — never over-scheduled. Candidates are teen stage-typical; judge scores whether the framing respects teen autonomy and stage.

candidates.title: Teen volunteer or maker program
candidates.description: A teen-led volunteering, coding, or maker program — optional and self-directed, often at a library or community centre.

candidates.title: Community pool lap or open swim
candidates.description: Open-swim or lane time a teenager can use independently at a municipal pool.

allowedTitles: Community pool lap or open swim
